metadata.name: Manifest: Write into Being manifests top card, turn face-up
metadata.description: p1 casts Write into Being ({2}{U}), which manifests the top card of p1's library face-down as a 2/2 creature (CR 701.40). The top card is Llanowar Elves. After the spell resolves the face-down 2/2 is on the battlefield. p1 then pays Llanowar Elves' mana cost {G} to turn it face-up (CR 701.40b), revealing it as the 1/1 Llanowar Elves. Tests the full manifest lifecycle: library top → face-down 2/2 → pay mana cost → face-up creature card.
metadata.generation_notes: Write into Being ({2}{U}) manifests the top card of its controller's library (CR 701.40: put it onto the battlefield face-down as a 2/2 colorless creature). Llanowar Elves ({G}, 1/1 creature) is set as top of library. Face-down manifest permanent has no name, P/T 2/2, colorless, no abilities (CR 707.3). Since Llanowar Elves is a creature card, its manifest can be turned face-up by paying its mana cost {G} (CR 701.40b). The harness turn_face_up action auto-detects TurnFaceUpMethod::ManaCost for Llanowar Elves because it has no Morph or Disguise ability definition. After turning face up, the permanent becomes Llanowar Elves (1/1, {T}: add {G}) and is visible by name on the battlefield. Initial mana pool: {colorless: 2, blue: 1, green: 1} to cover {2}{U} for Write into Being and {G} for the turn-face-up. Write into Being is not in the Available Cards list but card_id 'write-into-being' is provided by the caller. Llanowar Elves is in the Available Cards list (verified). Face-down state confirmed indirectly after resolution: stack is empty, hand is empty, and Llanowar Elves is NOT yet visible by name (has no name while face-down). After turn_face_up, 'Llanowar Elves' is visible by name on battlefield.

script.step_note: p1 casts Write into Being, manifesting the top library card face-down, then turns it face-up

actions.description: Initial: Write into Being in p1 hand, Llanowar Elves on top of library, battlefield empty

actions.note: CR 601.2: p1 casts Write into Being for {2}{U}; no targets required. Card moves to stack.

actions.description: After casting: Write into Being on stack, hand empty
actions.note: Write into Being is on the stack awaiting resolution.
CR 116.3: Both players pass priority — stack resolves top object.

resolution.note: CR 701.40: Manifest puts the top card of p1's library (Llanowar Elves) onto the battlefield face-down as a 2/2 colorless creature with no name, no abilities.

actions.note: CR 608.2: Write into Being resolves. Llanowar Elves is manifested from the top of p1's library.

actions.description: After resolution: stack empty, library empty, hand empty (face-down 2/2 on battlefield has no name)
actions.note: CR 707.3: The face-down permanent has no name, P/T 2/2, colorless, no text. Library is now empty. Write into Being is in p1's graveyard.

CR 701.40b: If a manifested permanent is a creature card, its controller may turn it face-up by paying its mana cost as a special action. Llanowar Elves costs {G}. Harness auto-detects TurnFaceUpMethod::ManaCost since Llanowar Elves has no Morph/Disguise ability.

actions.description: After turn face-up: Llanowar Elves (1/1) is now visible by name on p1's battlefield
actions.note: CR 707.8: The permanent is now face-up with its true characteristics: Llanowar Elves, 1/1 green creature, {T}: add {G}.
